title: Plural stemming single-token-only
description: Multi-word queries with plural tokens (recipes/dinners/ideas) never get stemmed; only single-token queries stem. Breaks recall for common natural-language queries.

title: Content family catalog density
description: Entire content families (weeknight recipe healthy/gluten-free/meal-prep) have 0 inspirations despite having templates. Search can't recall what doesn't exist. Requires content generation.

title: Flat token-count scoring no field weights
description: All blob fields (template_id/tags/topics/params/locale) weighted equally. A match in a param value ranks identically to a match in the template_id slug. Results within score tiers are essentially random.

title: Template bulk-promotion score-100 flood
description: When a template's i18n blob strictly matches, ALL its inspirations are promoted to score=100. A 168-inspiration template floods top results; order within the promoted group is JSON-insert-order, not quality.

title: rank_score unused in search ranking
description: Templates carry rank_score (1–155); used in browse/topic feeds but not in search inspiration ranking. High-quality templates get no search lift.

title: Concept expansion covers templates only
description: CONCEPT_SYNONYMS expansion only adds to matchedTemplateIdsByI18nUnion (template rail). Inspiration blob scoring uses only the original query tokens, so template rail and inspiration grid diverge for concept-expanded queries.

title: Gallery prompts exact-tag match only
description: Gallery prompts only surface when query exactly matches a known nano-banana tag. No fuzzy or token-overlap matching. Gallery is invisible for the vast majority of queries.

title: QUERY_ALIASES nearly empty 2 entries
description: Canonical normalization alias table has only cats→cat and kittens→kitten. Predictable content-domain aliases such as recipes→recipe are not registered; alias coverage relies on per-record search_aliases instead.

title: CJK bigram window generates non-words
description: Naive character sliding window on CJK queries generates cross-word-boundary bigrams such as 果中 from 水果中文 that never appear in any real Chinese text. Inflates possible-bigram count, raising effective match threshold.

title: Generable templates section isolated from main pipeline
description: LLM generable-template section is a completely independent client-side call with no deduplication against the main template rail. Same template can appear twice on the page. Process-local LRU cache is irrelevant in Vercel serverless because it is empty on every cold-start.
